examples: The purpose of your going to Gaya has already been achieved.
The idea came to me when I was traveling in India in Bodh Gaya.
Jada's son started at once for Gaya to worship Lord Visnu, to release his father from ghostly life.
Ho Gaya Na Pyar (Love Has Finally Happened) was shot at Dolbadarn Castle and the Llanberis mountain railway in north Wales.
One of Gaya's specialties is outfitting a house from top to bottom, which it is currently doing for an architect in Lima, Peru.
